learningGoal: A first-time visitor understands what Prime Self gives them immediately, why it feels different, and why starting now is easy.
keyPoints: Prime Self turns your birth date, time, and location into a Free Energy Blueprint in seconds
You see your Energy Type, Strategy, Authority, defined centers, and gates without needing to decode chart jargon alone
The Synthesis combines Human Design, Frequency Keys, and natal astrology into one clear reading you can actually use
You can start free, get your chart fast, and keep going deeper with daily transits, relationship insight, and practitioner support
script:
Before you learned to explain yourself, your pattern was already complete.

The exact moment of your birth — the alignment of planets, the angle of the sun — encoded something specific into you. Not a personality the world assigned. Not a role you were given. A frequency that was yours from the very beginning.

Human Design maps the architecture of that frequency.

Nine energy centers. Sixty-four gates. The channels that connect them — some consistent and defined, others open and receiving. Your type — the way your energy moves through the world. Your strategy — how life actually works for you when you stop forcing it. Your authority — the signal inside you that you can trust before the mind has a chance to complicate it.

This is not a horoscope. It is a map.

When you see your chart — when you understand what it actually says about how you were built to decide, to give, to receive, to move — something settles.

Not because you found an answer. Because you recognized something that was always already true.

Prime Self generates your free Energy Blueprint in seconds.

Begin.

visualBeats: Birth data becomes a Free Energy Blueprint
Nine centers and sixty-four gates, translated
Type, Strategy, and Authority become usable
Not a horoscope. A map you can work with

toneNotes: Homepage welcome video. The first sentence must hook with speed and clarity. Focus on what the viewer sees and understands, not abstract self-discovery language. End with a clean invitation to start free now.
